introSection: Frozen was a steel roller coaster previously located at Attrapark in Moscow City, Russia.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and white supports. The ride had green track and beige supports when it operated at Drievliet Family Park

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride ran trains with 2 cars originally, but one car was removed at some point.

fullText:
Frozen was a steel roller coaster previously located at Attrapark in Moscow City, Russia.



Blue track and white supports. The ride had green track and beige supports when it operated at Drievliet Family Park

The ride ran trains with 2 cars originally, but one car was removed at some point.
